name: LPA Group Plc
summary: LPA Group Plc, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the design, manufacture, and market industrial electrical and electronic products for rail, aerospace and defense, aircraft support, infrastructure, marine, and industrial markets primarily in the United Kingdom, rest of Europe, and internationally. It offers rail accessories, including earth studs and straps, plugs and sockets, and terminal rails products; aircraft ground power supply equipment, such as connectors, switched socket connectors, aircraft contact test kits, aircraft socket assembly kits, cable assemblies, crocodile cable carriers, flanged plugs and sockets, lanyard assemblies, plane power crocodile cable carriers, and plane power aircraft connectors and junction sleeves; enclosures, panels and looms, and power outlets; and circuit breakers. The company also provides contractors; door switches; fans; fluorescent lighting for rail vehicles; hydraulic/pneumatic pipe clamps; LED lights; Niphan fire resistant connection boxes, flanged sockets, and guard ring plugs; passenger seat electronics and lighting kits; rail auxiliary power systems that include battery rafts, control boxes, and shore supplies; rail inter-car electrical connectors comprising of connector system, connector plug and receptacles, ethernet communication harness, mixed power and communication harness, and power harness; relays; sockets for hermetically sealed relays; USB charging; and wiring accessories. In addition, it offers bespoke engineering and fabrication, and electronics and design manufacturing services, as well as LPA transport+ support solutions. The company also exports its products to approximately 50 countries. LPA Group Plc was incorporated in 1961 and is headquartered in Saffron Walden, the United Kingdom.
